title: 5/6/19 Stretched all day, Popular History of Ireland day 3

transcript.text: Good morning, living in Boulder Vlog for May 6th.
Oh shit, sorry, I forgot to put the good pillow under me.
The classy pillow. I've got my inside out pillow, whatever.
Yeah, May 6th. I'm wicked, I'm wick-wack-wasted, dude.
I don't know what the hell. I think it's because I'm old.
Maybe it's because when you get old, you get wick-wack-wasted.
Whatever, whatever.
There's always the next generation.
You can help.
Or maybe if you just keep training, you'll get better.
But yeah, yesterday I was, I done gone, went and stretched all day long-y-woo.
And yeah, just until 8, until like 11 to 8 for like 9 hours or something.
I was listening to my book, Popular History of Ireland.
And so that was my third day on Popular History of Ireland.
It's a 2,000-page book, so if I listen to it all day today, maybe I can get it done.
And that'll be an average of 500 pages a day from listening to somebody read it,
Which is slower than if you have the computer read it, because I have it on like double speed.
So I think maybe, I don't know, maybe the next book I do is, well, when I stretch all day, I guess, or ride or run,
I'll try to do it when the computer reads it to me.
But that means I have to, yeah.
If it gets, sometimes, see the way that with Apple's go, if you, Apple computer phone,
If you hit the screen and make it go dark, it stops reading, you know, and then you wouldn't exactly know where it is.
They need to fix that.
Six months ago, if you touch the screen, it'll stop reading.
Now it'll actually read it with you, but if you make it go, and you can still touch the screen and it won't go dark.
So they need one more step where you can make it go dark and just not forget, not, you know, forget about it.
And then you can do the whole book.
So I'll do a book like that sometime, but I wanted to switch them to MP3.
You have to record it, though, because, you know, copyright, you can't just convert, you know, into an MP3 from a book.
That'd be awesome if you could, maybe later.
Um, so, um, yeah, and I, so, it's a super boring book, but, um, when I'm done with this, I want to do another book, like a philosophy book.
Um, so, um, yeah, my legs are totally sore, just like I thought they would be, just from the stretching.
But, um, I think it's going to do wonders for my ability to run.
I wasn't able to run the other day.
Um, so, uh, yeah, um, tomorrow I bring my car in, morning I bring my car in for the, um, uh, to get this gas leak fixed and I can drive my car again.
Um, yeah, it's like 1130, I slept in until 11, I got to sleep maybe at midnight.
I watched that Ted Bundy movie with my fiancee last night.
Um, and, um, um, I, uh, um, yeah, um, so today I'm going to, I'm totally wasted, man.

Like, surprisingly, um, it's, see, getting back in shape, I should probably do this on my getting back in shape vlog, but, um, like when I was, I was so out of shape and I didn't do anything for so long that I was in physical pain most of the time, like really bad physical pain, but it's the same exact type of physical pain that you feel when you're exhausted.

So it's kind of like, I don't know the difference, you know, like I could wait a couple of days and not get better because my being exhausted could just morph into feeling like shit from not exercising.
So it's like, it's like, am I really tired or am I just, you know, out of shape?
So I think I'm going to go swimming today.
That'll be my exercise today.
I can't, I don't want to run my joints, you know, and my muscles are sore, but after I swim, if I have extra energy and time in the day, I'll go, go riding.
Um, somebody left a comment on my main channel yesterday of my, uh, training with Kyle V-Log.
I have a training with Kyle V-Log on my main channel and that's where I only talk about the training.
It's pretty much the same videos, but I just want to keep the personal stuff on this channel.
Somebody said that they wanted me to do it in Spanish.
So yeah, I do have a Spanish channel, so maybe I'll start doing videos in Spanish too.
Um, so, um, yeah, I got my little, um, my little, um, foot thing, my knit from Garmin, a little, new little foot pod.
So I'll see if I can hook that up to Zwift and if I can't, hey, maybe Zwift will recommend something else you can use and buy another foot pod from another company.
I really want to be able to do Zwift running, um, cause I have a treadmill here in my room and a 70 inch TV.
So anyways, that's my V-Log for today.
Peace out.
Talk to you tomorrow.
